notes: Two-rule fixture: (1) kah on 'siapa' → 'siapakah' (formal who?); (2) dia → they (gender-neutral). English 'Who are they?' uses singular 'they' since Indonesian dia is gender-unspecified. VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: 'Who is that?' might be more natural if the referent is known visually; this fixture assumes the speaker is asking about an unknown person.
